View recipe
===========

Screen: `/view-recipe` (navigated with argument `recipeId`)

`RecipePage` fetches recipe details from `/view-recipe/<recipeId>` and shows steps. It uses `complete-step` and `uncomplete-step` to toggle step completion for current user.

Service
-------

- `frontend/features/view_recipe/services/service_view_recipe.dart::ViewService.viewRecipe`
- `frontend/features/view_recipe/services/service_view_recipe.dart::ViewService.completeStep`
- `frontend/features/view_recipe/services/service_view_recipe.dart::ViewService.unCompleteStep`
